excerpts.excerpt:
VOICE (O.S.)
But she wasn’t just meat, Jason.
She was a person. Our film
professor.
Jason drains his second shot.
JASON
Fuck her, she gave me a C minus on
my giallo paper. She shoulda been
teaching a class on the MCU at a
community college. Trust me, film
academia is better off without her.
VOICE (O.S.)
Is that why you killed her?
Because of the C minus? Who’s
next, your grade school vice
principal?
Jason stops mid-pour and sets the bottle down. Tensing.
JASON
You know who’s next. Why are you
being like this?
VOICE (O.S.)
Come on, Jason. How long have we
known each other?

SAM
Where’s Tara?
QUINN
She went to the Omega Kappa Beta
party.
SAM
I begged her not to go to that!
QUINN
We have now arrived at mad.
SAM
Did she at least take her taser?
QUINN
I cannot speak to how heavily armed
Tara is at this fraternity party.
From the bedroom we hear:
White Production Draft (04/27/22) 18.

Pink Rev. (06/07/22) 19.
PAUL 2.0 (O.S.)
Babe, are you coming back?
Sam looks at Quinn and mouths “Babe”? Quinn shrugs. Sam
sees Tara’s taser on the table grabs it, catching a glimpse
of a HANDSOME SHIRTLESS MAN (20s) in the adjacent apartment.

SAM *(CONT’D)
Don’t you ever put hands on my
sister!
FRAT DUDE (O.S.)
Oh shit, it’s that psycho girl!
Pink Rev. (06/07/22) 23.

Pink Rev. (06/07/22) 23A.
Tara storms past her out of the house, mortified. Chad and *
Mindy both give Sam a twins-style thumbs-up. *
EXT. NEW YORK CITY UNIVERSITY - QUAD - NIGHT17 17
Tara, fuming, storming across campus. Sam, Chad, Ethan,
Anika, and Mindy following.
SAM
Tara, will you stop--?
Pink Rev. (06/07/22) 23A.

(MORE)
White Production Draft (04/27/22) 24.
Tara whirls on her.

VOICE (O.S.)
Don’t be cute. You’re going to pay
for what you did. I’m going to
butcher you and everyone you love.
SAM
You’re just another psycho like all
the others-
VOICE (O.S.)
Oh, there’s never been one like me,
Sam. I’m something... different.
You and Tara better watch your
backs.
SAM
You better watch yours-
As GHOSTFACE with the aged mask suddenly springs up from the
stairwell and YANKS TARA OVER THE RAILING! Raises his knife
to drive it into her stomach, Casey Becker-style-
Pink Rev. (06/07/22) 33.

White Production Draft (04/27/22) 34.
SAM (CONT’D)
TARA!
Tara elbows him in the gut and he stumbles back, winded. She
scrambles up the stairs and she and Sam run up the sidewalk.

On Sam and Tara, absorbing this.
MINDY (CONT’D)
And Rule Three, no one is safe.
Legacy characters are cannon fodder
at this point, usually brought back
only to be killed off in some cheap
bid for nostalgia. Sidney’s smart
to sit this one out, but it’s not
looking too good for Gale and
Kirby. And that’s not even the
worst part.
Chad looks to the others.
CHAD
This is when she tells us the worst
part.

BAILEY
Maybe? There was another mask left *
at the scene. DNA matches to a
Roman Bridger.
KIRBY
The Ghostface who was directing
Stab 3. It’s like he’s leaving us
real life franchise Easter eggs -
dropping the killers’ masks in
reverse. Almost like he’s counting
down to something.
BAILEY
What happens when he gets to one?
They stare at each other as we TIMECUT TO...
INT. POLICE STATION - AFTERNOON32A 32A
Kirby now stands in front of an EXPOSITION WHITEBOARD
containing photos and dates of ALL PREVIOUS GHOSTFACES.
KIRBY
There have been nine Ghostface
killers so far.
BAILEY
Nine? But I thought in the movies-
KIRBY
Forget the movies, the movies don’t
matter.

Suddenly, everyone’s phones buzz as they receive the same *
AIRDROPPED FILE - a photo from Danny of Ghostface attacking
Quinn.
Oh fuck. Everyone in the room slowly turns back towards
Quinn’s room, as the banging stops
They stare at the door. Frozen. On Anika. The suspense is
killing her. She has to know. She takes a step towards
it... Mindy GRABS her arm.
MINDY (CONT’D)
Run.
The door opens inward and QUINN’S BLOODY BODY flies into the
room! Launched by Ghostface!
TARA
Quinn!
The body slams into Anika, knocking her back onto the couch-
CHAD
Come on!
He grabs Tara’s hand, dragging her towards the front door.
Sam lunges into the kitchen, going for the knife block --
-- but all the knives are gone.
Anika, screaming, pushes Quinn’s dead body off her, Mindy
going to help her as - GHOSTFACE FILLS THE BEDROOM DOORWAY in
front of her. Mindy looks up at him...
MINDY
Oh fuck.

SAM
Agreed.
Bailey nods. A moment of solidarity between them. Broken as
Sam sees GALE approaching.
GALE
Are you okay? I came as soon as I
heard-
SAM
Gale, I swear to God-
GALE
Truce, okay? I’m here for whatever
you need.
(off their looks)
No, really, I am!
(off even worse looks)
Fine, off the record, okay?
TARA
Thanks, Gale. Sorry I punched you.
Gale studies her. Smiles at what she sees.
GALE
No, you’re not.
TARA
(smiles)
No, I’m not.
White Production Draft (04/27/22) 63.

The sirens blare as they peel out, leaving Bailey gaping.
BAILEY
I’m a police officer which means
you’re not allowed to steal my car
OMITTED57A 57A *
INT. GALE'S APARTMENT - NIGHT58 58
Gale and Brooks, on the couch as the LANDLINE rings. *
BROOKS
This’ll be the food. *
(answering) *
Hello? *
(listens; then)
Not the food. It’s for you.
GALE
Who is it?
BROOKS
Who may I ask is calling?
(listens)
He says it’s the killer?
Gale snatches the phone from him.
GALE
Hello?
VOICE (O.S.)
Hello, Gale. Strange that you and
I have never spoken on the phone.

But he’s got her. The tip of the blade, brushing her
eyelashes. We’re not gonna want to see this...
SAM (O.S.)
Hey!
Sam and Tara race in! Sam sees the gun and dives for it!
Ghostface rolls off Gale as Sam comes up with the weapon!
FIRING!
Bullets tear through things! Ghostface barrels through the
fire door to the EMERGENCY STAIRS, as the gun clicks dry.
Sam, about to go after him when
TARA
Sam!
She turns back, sees Gale, Oh fuck. She and Tara run to her.
White Production Draft (04/27/22) 82.

Pink Rev. (06/07/22) 82A.
TARA (CONT’D)
Gale...
Gale manages to focus on them. Tears in Sam’s eyes, at her *
breaking point seeing Gale this messed up. *
SAM *
I’m so sorry, I- I should have *
known he’d come after you- *
Pink Rev. (06/07/22) 82A.

The train pulls into the next station. Very few people get
out, and a whole lot more get on. All pressed together.
The Ghostface that was staring at Sam is suddenly visible
again, pushing through the mass of bodies towards Sam --
Oh fuck - coming right at her. She eyes the doors...
SAM
Guys-
The others see the charging Ghostface...
Danny steps in front of Sam-- The doors start closing and
Ghostface SHOVES people out of his way...
White Production Draft (04/27/22) 89.

White Production Draft (04/27/22) 89A.
Before leaping through the doors just before they shut. The
train starts moving again. Everyone exhales.
INT. OTHER SUBWAY CAR - SAME TIME73A 73A
Mindy is forced into a corner by a new throng of passengers
that just boarded. Stiff as a board. Watching everyone...
THE LIGHTS GO OUT.
White Production Draft (04/27/22) 89A.

Pink Rev. (06/07/22) 90.

Pink Rev. (06/07/22) 102A.
SAM
Richie?
(pause)
You’re Richie’s family?
Ethan lunges again, this time he slashes Sam’s arm, drawing *
blood! Cackling as she clutches her wound. *
Pink Rev. (06/07/22) 102A.

White Production Draft (04/27/22) 103.
ETHAN
Ding-ding-ding, now she’s finally
getting it!
BAILEY
Once I saw the photos of what you
did to my son, I knew... I knew you
had to die like a fucking animal.
You had to be punished, and so did
anyone who got in our way. But my
wife... disagreed.
ETHAN
(proudly)
I took care of her myself!

TARA DROPS! Ethan holds his knife straight up, hers is out
too. She falls onto his blade stomach first-
ETHAN
GOTCHA!
But Tara drives her own knife through his open mouth and down
his throat. Ethan falls to his knees and Tara twists the
knife in his throat.
TARA
Now... die a fucking virgin.
Simultaneously - Sam gets the gun and raises it! Quinn
freezes, just a few feet away. Sam smiles at her, mean.
SAM
Looks like you’re down another
brother.
Quinn howls and charges anyway and BLAM! Sam fires and hits
Quinn, whose head snaps back in a spray of blood!
SAM (CONT’D)
(to herself)
Always gotta shoot ‘em in the
head...
Bailey has just arrived at the top of the stairs and seen
both of his remaining children die.
BAILEY
NO!
